methodology.fx_conversion: Point-in-time metrics (AUM, market cap) use period-end FX; flow metrics (FRE, revenue, earnings) use period-average FX; ratio/growth metrics are currency-neutral.
methodology.fx_materiality_threshold: FX_MATERIAL=true where |fx_delta between avg and end rate| > 5% of rate or > 30% of absolute value
methodology.fiscal_year_alignment: Calendar year basis. Non-calendar FY firms: HLNE (March FY, FY2025→FY2024 proxy), ICG (March FY, FY ending Mar-2024 as FY2024 proxy).

FIRM-010.label: ANI (Adjusted Net Income)
FIRM-010.note: EQT uses Adjusted Net Income rather than FRE convention; excludes unrealized carry but includes some items not in standard FRE.

FIRM-011.label: Net Revenue proxy
FIRM-011.note: Man Group discloses net revenue as primary profitability metric; FRE equivalent estimated from management fee revenue less comp.

FIRM-014.label: EBIT of asset management
FIRM-014.note: Partners Group reports EBIT of asset management business; excludes equity-based comp differently from US convention.

FIRM-016.label: Management fee income proxy
FIRM-016.note: ICG uses management fee income as FRE proxy; excludes investment income and realisation fees which peers include differently.

methodology.outlier_detection: >2 SD from cross-sectional mean flagged outlier=true
methodology.de_cagr_derivation: MET-VD-003 derived from DE/share panel: (DE_FY2024/DE_FY2021)^(1/3)-1 where both periods available. derived_from_panel=true. contextual_only=true — not in correlation.
